slides.title: How to actually hit your *protein goal*.
slides.sub: Most people miss it by 40g a day. Here's the fix — no shakes required.

slides.title: Anchor every meal
slides.body: Build each plate around a *protein source* first. Let carbs and fats fill the gaps.

slides.title: Know your number
slides.body: Aim for *0.7–1g per lb* of goal bodyweight. Most people are nowhere close.

slides.title: Front-load breakfast
slides.body: *30g at breakfast* kills cravings and makes the rest of the day easy.

slides.title: Keep easy wins stocked
slides.body: Greek yogurt, eggs, chicken, tofu, jerky. *Boring beats nothing.*

slides.title: Track it for one week
slides.body: You can't fix what you can't see. *One week of logging* is genuinely eye-opening.

slides.title: Hit it *without the guesswork*.
slides.body: Snap your meals and Vibe Health counts your protein for you — so you actually hit the number.

caption:
Most people miss their protein by ~40g a day and wonder why they're always hungry. 🍗

Anchor every meal, front-load breakfast, keep easy wins stocked. No shakes required. Save this. 🔖

Snap your meals and Vibe counts your protein for you → link in bio.
youtube_title: How to Actually Hit Your Protein Goal

bg_prompts.cover: Black-and-white cinematic editorial photograph. Dramatic low-key lighting, deep shadows, dark charcoal background. Realistic texture, shallow depth of field. A fit man plating a simple high-protein meal — grilled chicken and eggs — in a dim kitchen, side light catching the steam.
